title: Scientists find yeast in ancient Iceman's guts -- and make bread
description: Yeast has been growing in the guts of a frozen mummy called Oetzi the Iceman for thousands of years, scientists have discovered, telling AFP they used it to make a tasty sourdough bread.

title: Why women in India used dhoop on their hair – Ancient hair beauty secret making comeback
description: Discover why women in India traditionally used dhoop on their hair and how this centuries-old beauty ritual helped maintain healthy, fragrant, and strong hair. Learn the benefits of this ancient hair care practice and why it continues to remain relevant today.

title: Scientists discover 210-million-year-old crocodile relative in New Mexico fossil
description: Researchers have identified a new prehistoric crocodile relative, Eosphorosuchus lacrimosa, from 210-million-year-old fossils discovered in New Mexico. The ancient reptile featured a shorter snout, a sturdier skull and powerful jaws adapted for hunting larger prey during the Late Triassic period

title: 'It was very very good': Ötzi the Iceman's body is covered in ancient yeast — and scientists just used it to make a sourdough
description: A new study cultivated four strains of cold-adapted yeasts that had colonized Ötzi's body shortly after his death 5,300 years ago in the Alps.
